evidence: pullback_long generated 39.3% of latest PnL but the worst trade entered with ES structure score 3, higher-low -0.5, higher-high -4.0, VWAP slope 0.0015, zero early MFE, and 132.9 minute hold. The profile remains profitable enough that a broad prune is unacceptable.
name: Pullback Structure Floor Holdout
risk: ES score-3 pullbacks are also a meaningful profit bucket; this may suppress the core edge if score does not truly separate tail from fast winners.
trigger: VALID_0DTE pullback_long entries with weak ES structure score before reclaim continuation.
validation_metric: Pullback_long average MAE and worst MAE improve while total net profit stays >=98% of run_001, pullback_long PnL retention stays >=90%, pnl_per_exposure_hour is flat or better, and completed trades drop <=10%.
